verses.text: Tua ni ciangin Judah gamsungah hih la kisa ding hi: Khuapi muan'huai khat i nei a, Topa mahmah in i kulhte leh i pan'mun kipte hong hutsak hi
Upna-ah a kip thuman minamte a lut theihna dingin kulhkongpite hong ta un
Topa aw, nang hong muang a, nangma tungah a lungsim khempeuh a koih mipa lungnopna kicing pia ta in
Topa Pasian in eite khempeuh hong hu tawntung ahih manin Topa muang tawntung un
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a kiphasak mite niamkhiat suk hi. Amau' ten'na khuapi muan'huai suksiatsak a, a kulhpite den'khap sakin leivui a suah hi
A zawng a cimawh a kinengniam mite in tu-in tua khua tuancil uh hi
Midikpa' lampi tamkim a, nangmah in midikpa' lampi na neelsak hi
Topa aw, nangma deihna kong zui uh a, nang kong ngak uh hi. Nang pen kote' deih kicin'na na hi hi

Ka lungsim khempeuh tawh zanin nang kong deih a, zingsang khuavak ciangin lungsim tak tawh nang kong zong hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh leitung leh a mite tungah thu na khen ciangin leitunga a teng mite in thuman i cih bang hiam, cih a phawk ding uh hi

Migilote tungah nangmah na migit hangin a manin gamtat ding theithei tuanlo uh a, lungsim thutang mite' gamsungah amaute in khialhna bawllai veve uh hi. Amaute in Topa' minliatna hong phawk nuamlo uh hi

Topa aw, amaute gim na piak ding lamtak na galte in theilo uh hi. Amaute maizumna thuaksak in la, amaute-a' dingin na geelsa gimnate amaute thuaksak in. Na mite na itna thu na galte tungah kilangsak in
Topa aw, kote tungah mavan'na hong pia in. Kote' matut zawhna khempeuh nangmah in na hong sepsakna hang ahi hi
Topa, kote' Pasian aw, nang a hilo to dangte in ko tungah hong uk hangin, nangmah bek mah kote' Topa na hi hi

Amaute si a, hingkik lo ding uh hi. Amaute mangthang ta uh a, omkik nawnlo ding uh hi. Tua bang a pian'theihna dingin nangmah in amaute tungah siatna na tungsak a, amaute a kiphawkna khempeuh na beisak hi
Ahih hangin nangmah in ko minam nong khangsak hi. Topa aw, nangmah in ko minam nong khangsak a, gamgi khempeuh na hong keeksak khin hi. Hih thu hangin nangma min a thang hi
Topa aw, ka cihmawh uh ciangin nang kong zong uh a, nangma hong taina pen kote nong gimpiakna ahi hi
Topa aw, nangma hangin kote pen naupaii numei a hun a nai ciangin na sa-in kiheek a, a kap tawh ka kibang uh hi
Kote in naupaii-in ka kiheekheek uh a, huih bek a hingkhia tawh ka kibang uh hi. Kote in ka gam uh-a' ding bangmah ka suakkhiasak kei uh a, leitungah a teng ding mi kuamah ka hingkhia kei uh hi

Nangma mi a sisate hingkik ding uh a, amau' pumpi thokik ding hi. Han sungah a lum mite aw, tho-in lungdamin la sa un! Bang hang hiam cih leh zing daitui in leitung a nosak kik bangin sawtpi-a a sisa mite Topa in hingkiksak ding hi
Ka mite aw, hong pai-in na innsung uhah tum un la, na kongte uh khak un. Hehna a dam matengin tawlkhat sung bu un

Bang hang hiam cih leh en un, amau' mawhna hangin leitungah a teng mite gim a pia dingin ama omna panin Topa hong paikhia a, leitung in ama tunga a kithat mite lakkhia ding a, a kithat ama mite sincip nawnlo ding hi.
